title: Extracting Sentiment from Text
scenario: Given a text string representing customer feedback, extract the sentiment (positive, negative, or neutral) using a natural language processing library. The target output should be a JSON object with the sentiment as the value. Constraints: Must handle text preprocessing, must use a library like NLTK for sentiment analysis.
constraints: Must use a library like NLTK for sentiment analysis

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the generated code adhere to the constraints?
Is the generated JSON syntax valid?
Does the generated code accurately implement sentiment analysis?
